<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check initial state from history
if len(history) > 0:
    # Get the earliest frame
    initial = history[0].frame
    seg = initial.segmentation
    print("Initial state objects:")
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        b = n['boundary']
        if b:
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            if n['pixels'] > 5:
                print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
    
    lines = initial.ascii.split('\n')
    print(f"\nInitial step: {initial.step}, level: {initial.level}")
    print(f"Initial yellow bar: {sum(1 for i in range(64) if i < len(lines) and len(lines[i]) > 63 and lines[i][63] == 'Y')}")

# Check if there's a seeded initial frame before any actions
print(f"\nHistory length: {len(history)}")
print(f"Transitions length: {len(transitions)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
